properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I could search all this world I’d still find there is no one like You I could gain everything In the end all is lost without You Oh Jesus, all that I desire

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I want to know You, I want to know You, I want to know You, And be known by You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I’m gonna love You Give all my heart to You I want to know You And be known by You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I am whole, I’m complete I’m content just to stay in this place All my guilt, all my shame Washed away in Your river of grace, Oh, Jesus, all that I desire.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My devotion, my affection, all my worship I pour it out, I pour it out on You
